Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I was told to go to the fourth floor today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I go back to my room for today...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel tired. I should get some rest...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm feeling very tired... I should[n]go to bed early today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}No new names have been added recently...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Junpei's name was added[n]to the list in bold letters.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka's name is written[n]beautifully on the list.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis's name is added in[n]perfectly printed writing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"Ken Amada" is written in full Kanji...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A paw print has been added.[n]I wonder if it's Koromaru's...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It has ten names written on it.[n]The dorm is getting more lively...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It has ten names written on it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The names of my friends who have sworn[n]to protect everyone's future are listed...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The final battle we are about to face...[n]I'll give it my all together with them...[n]{f 1 1}
